old_halna.name: Old Halna
intro: A figure crouches by a fallen pine, knife working at sinew.
'You,' she says. 'Wolves shut my trail north. Thin them — five of them —',
'and I will move what's blocking your road.'
in_progress: Old Halna nods at the trail. 'Not yet. Bring me five wolves down.'
complete: Old Halna stands without a word, drags the carcass aside.
'The road runs to my old cache now. Take what's there.'

weir_engineer.name: the Weir Engineer
intro: An old hand, mud to the elbow, hauling at a beam that won't move.
'The bridge ahead — the wood I need was carried off by the Threshers.',
'Bring me ten reeds from their backs and I'll rebuild what was lost.'
in_progress: The engineer nods at the broken bridge. 'Still need those reeds.'
complete: The engineer takes the reeds, lays them straight, weighs them down.
'The bridge holds. Walk it — there's an old dyke still standing on the other side.'

lampkeeper.name: the Lampkeeper
intro: An old man with a dead lamp. He has been trying to light it for hours.
'The Pall-Sworn Magistrates keep the city dark. Bring me three of them put down',
'and the lamps of the north quarter will burn again — and what's there with them.'
in_progress: The lampkeeper turns the lamp over in his hands. 'Three magistrates. Bring them down.'
complete: The lampkeeper strikes the flint once. The lamp catches. Light spills north.
'The Burned Library stands open. Read what was not yet unremembered.'

old_penitent.name: the Old Penitent
intro: A figure sits cross-legged on the grey rock, eyes closed. Their robe is ash and tatters.
'I have forgotten my own name. The Pall took it on this climb.',
'Bring me twenty scavver fangs — the small dead remember small things best —',
'and I will say my name aloud, and the shrine below will open.'
in_progress: The penitent does not open their eyes. 'Twenty fangs. The small dead first.'
complete: The penitent opens their eyes. Says one word — a name — and the wind goes still.
'The Pre-Pall Shrine remembers itself. So do I. Go down to it.'
Something opens in the rock behind them, and a Mournhold Scholar steps from it,
blinking. She follows you back to Gravewatch.
